recent_created.name: android_studio_intro
recent_created.description: Simple intro Android Studio layout assignment (Java, API 34, Groovy DSL): activity_main.xml with a centered Button (Say Hello), a Plain Text field, and an empty TextView. Includes notes, rubric, reflection, and a Word write-up.

recent_created.name: pell-grant-ripoff-calculator
recent_created.description: PyQt6 desktop app: import your Degree Works audit PDF, see what a Pell Grant cut really costs you per term/month, and find Sophia Learning transfer courses that finish your open requirements for a fraction of tuition

recent_created.name: CS-350-Emerging-Systems-Architectures

recent_created.name: raspberry-pi-smart-thermostat
recent_created.description: Simple Raspberry Pi smart thermostat with AHT20 temperature sensing, LCD status output, PWM LED feedback, UART telemetry, and modular Python control logic.
